title: Constraints
description: Constraint untuk menjaga integritas data di PostgreSQL.

commands.name: PRIMARY KEY
commands.title: Primary Key
commands.description: Constraint yang menjamin nilai unik dan NOT NULL untuk identifikasi baris.
commands.syntax:
kolom tipe PRIMARY KEY
-- atau
CONSTRAINT nama_pk PRIMARY KEY (kolom1, kolom2)

commands.name: FOREIGN KEY
commands.title: Foreign Key
commands.description: Constraint referensial yang menghubungkan kolom ke primary key tabel lain.
commands.syntax: kolom tipe REFERENCES tabel_lain(kolom) [ON DELETE action] [ON UPDATE action]

options.description: Sama dengan RESTRICT tapi dicek di akhir transaction

commands.notes: DEFERRABLE FK memungkinkan cek constraint ditunda sampai COMMIT.

commands.name: UNIQUE
commands.title: Unique Constraint
commands.syntax:
kolom tipe UNIQUE
CONSTRAINT nama UNIQUE (kolom1, kolom2)
commands.notes: UNIQUE mengizinkan multiple NULL kecuali NULLS NOT DISTINCT.

commands.name: CHECK
commands.title: Check Constraint
commands.description: Validasi bahwa data memenuhi kondisi tertentu.
commands.notes: CHECK constraint dievaluasi saat INSERT dan UPDATE.

commands.name: EXCLUDE
commands.title: Exclusion Constraint
commands.description: Constraint unik PostgreSQL — memastikan tidak ada overlap berdasarkan operator tertentu.
commands.notes: Memerlukan extension btree_gist. Sangat berguna untuk scheduling/booking.
